pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 1.8 would result in a mismatch between the intended runtime and the build configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.8.0) do not support compiling for Java 21 release levels, causing build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source and target tags is deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and may not correctly enforce module path or language features for Java 21.
